meaning: n.记录,登记簿,登记,注册,寄存器vt.记录,登记,注册,提示,把...挂号vi.登记,注册,挂号
examples: Thousands lined up to register to vote.
Have you come to register at the school?
Could you sign the hotel register please, sir?
If found guilty of serious professional misconduct he could be permanently erased from the medical register.
Connecticut divines intent from 28 factors ranging from where you register your dog to where you pray.
